title: The Ghost of the Greenbrier Hotel

scenes.text: A luxurious hotel conceals a troubling history of disappearances.
The unsettling stories took place at The Greenbrier in West Virginia.
Multiple guests have vanished under mysterious circumstances within the hotel since the 1800s.
The tales of the vanished guests continue to spark intrigue and speculation.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED

scenes.text: Follow for the cases that were never solved.

description: 📍 White Sulphur Springs, USA - 1800s. The Greenbrier Hotel holds a dark history of disappearing guests and haunted stories that linger in the halls. Follow for daily cold cases!
